name: Jelly Covers
overview: Cover extraction for books, audiobooks, comics, and music — with online fallback via Open Library & Google Books.
description: Cover provider for Jellyfin libraries. Extracts PDF first pages via pdftoppm, searches EPUB archives for cover images, and extracts embedded artwork from audio files via ffmpeg. When local extraction fails, automatically fetches covers from Open Library and Google Books as a last resort.
